news.t: Franklin Templeton Launches the Franklin Small Cap Enhanced ETF (FSML)

holdings.infoBox: FSML is an equity ETF with a total of 304 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 2.47%, Guardant Health at 1.74%, Vishay Intertechnology at 1.62%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 1.47%, and GeneDx Holdings at 1.40%.

overview.description: The Franklin Small Cap Enhanced ETF (FSML) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed ETF using a quantitative framework to invest in US small-cap stocks. The fund aims for long-term capital appreciation. FSML was launched on Dec 9, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Launches the Franklin Small Cap Enhanced ETF (FSML)
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton, a global investment leader with more than $1.6 trillion in assets under management, today announced the launch of the Franklin Small Cap Enhance...
